query: SELECT positionCode, COUNT(*) as total_questions, MIN(itemNumber) as min_item, MAX(itemNumber) as max_item FROM performance_evaluation_items WHERE positionCode IN ('IZGARA', 'SERVIS', 'KASA', 'IZGARA_YONETICI') GROUP BY positionCode ORDER BY positionCode;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46m8FvVm7HSsc1z.root --database 6XmnMHSGkmqmcvGw6sxZ3M --execute SELECT positionCode, COUNT(*) as total_questions, MIN(itemNumber) as min_item, MAX(itemNumber) as max_item FROM performance_evaluation_items WHERE positionCode IN ('IZGARA', 'SERVIS', 'KASA', 'IZGARA_YONETICI') GROUP BY positionCode ORDER BY positionCode;
